items.title: The Escape Game

items.synopsis_short: A real murder takes place on…
items.synopsis_full: A real murder takes place on an escape room-themed game show. (Ages 14 and up)

items.title: The Exquisite Torment of Loving Your Enemy
items.author: Brigitte Knightley
items.synopsis_short: The second book in the Dearly…
items.synopsis_full: The second book in the Dearly Beloathed series. Boundaries weaken between an assassin and a healer.

items.title: Twisted Road
items.author: Christine Feehan
items.synopsis_full: The 10th book in the Torpedo Ink series.

items.title: The Eye of the Bedlam Bride
items.author: Matt Dinniman
items.synopsis_full: The sixth book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. On the eighth floor, Carl and Donut must capture a dangerous monster. Read by Jeff Hays, Patrick Warburton, Travis Baldree and Annie Ellicott. 26 hours, 46 minutes unabridged.

items.title: A Parade of Horribles
items.author: Matt Dinniman
items.synopsis_full: The eighth book in the “Dungeon Crawler Carl” series. A sense of normalcy might be a set-up that spells danger for Carl and Donut. Read by Jeff Hays. 20 hours, 27 minutes unabridged.

items.title: The Dungeon Anarchist's Cookbook
items.author: Matt Dinniman
items.synopsis_full: The third book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Carl and Donut are up against a subway system filled with monsters.

items.title: Carl's Doomsday Scenario
items.author: Matt Dinniman
items.synopsis_full: The second book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. Carl and Donut confront an ancient spell and heightened dangers.

items.title: The Butcher's Masquerade
items.author: Matt Dinniman
items.synopsis_full: The fifth book in the "Dungeon Crawler Carl" series. The action moves to the sixth floor, which is known as the Hunting Grounds. Read by Jeff Hays. 23 hours, 33 minutes unabridged.

items.title: A Resistance History of the United States
items.author: Tad Stoermer
items.synopsis_short: Moments in American history that elucidate…
items.synopsis_full: Moments in American history that elucidate the tension between resistance and power.

items.title: The Deal
items.author: Elle Kennedy
items.synopsis_short: Hannah Wells makes a deal with…
items.synopsis_full: Hannah Wells makes a deal with the captain of the college hockey team in exchange for tutoring him that may complicate their relationship.
